Why Nature's Canvas

Crafted to Perfection,
Designed for Life

🪵
01

Craftsmanship at Its Finest

We don't just make tables, we create living art. Each piece blends artisan mastery with bespoke design, where the finest local wood meets premium resin to produce furniture that captivates and tells your story.

⏳
02

A Piece for Life

Each piece transcends function to become a lifelong companion. Crafted with enduring strength and timeless style, made to grow more beautiful with every passing year in your home.

🌱
03

Locally Rooted

We honour the gifts of nature with craftsmanship and care. Our materials are responsibly sourced, our processes deliberate, and our commitment to quality matched only by our love for the craft and community.

How It Works

From Concept
to Creation

Every commission follows a careful process to ensure the final piece exceeds your expectations.

01

Consultation

We discuss your space, style and vision, in person, by phone or WhatsApp.

02

Design & Quote

We share a sketch or mood board with your custom quote and timeline.

03

Creation

Your piece is handcrafted with care, we send progress photos along the way.

04

Delivery

We deliver anywhere in Accra, packaged safely and ready to display.

Work With Us

Something made just
for you

Tell us what you have in mind, a resin table, a painting, or a gift for someone special.

Start a Commission

What People Say

★★★★★

"I would like to start by thanking Annie, who offered excellent assistance, showing herself to be highly professional, competent, and courteous. In addition to guiding me in choosing the table, she provided valuable advice on its maintenance, her dedication and attention to detail exceeded all expectations, making the entire experience unique."

— Maame Vanessa · May 2026

★★★★★

"They deserve five full stars for service and quality. I was very worried about making such an important purchase, but I trusted them and they fully delivered."

— Agbe's Pub · March 2026

★★★★★

"The table arrived beautiful. The finishes are perfect and the quality is perceived at first glance. In person it's even more beautiful than the photos Annie sent during production. We are very satisfied with the final product and the attention and professionalism of the whole team."

— Haija Amina · January 2026

Common Questions

FAQ

Everything you need to know before placing your order.

Most resin tables take 2–4 weeks from confirmed order to delivery. Complex pieces may take up to 6 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline during consultation.
Absolutely, every table is built to your exact dimensions. From compact coffee tables to large dining tables. Share your measurements and we'll handle the rest.
Our primary zone is Greater Accra. For Kumasi, Takoradi and other regions we arrange delivery via trusted courier. Additional costs apply, contact us to discuss.
We offer 12+ options including ocean blue, forest green, smoke grey, crystal clear, amber, midnight black, gold flake and deep red. We can also mix custom shades.
Wipe with a soft damp cloth, avoid abrasive cleaners. Use coasters for very hot items. Avoid prolonged direct sunlight. With basic care your table will last for decades.
Yes, 50% deposit to confirm your order. The balance is due upon completion before delivery. We accept MTN Mobile Money, Vodafone Cash and bank transfer.
Yes! We send progress photos at key stages. You're also welcome to visit our studio in Accra to inspect your piece before delivery.
Yes, resin tables are one part of what we do. We also create original paintings, carved woodwork, decorative mirrors and mixed-media art. All commissions welcome.
